interaction.meta.select.start: &aSelection mode started. &7Use a command block to select positions.
interaction.meta.select.not_in_mode: &cYou are not in selection mode. &7Use /imyvm-world-geo select start first.
interaction.meta.select.reset: &aYour selection points have been reset. &7You are still in selection mode.

interaction.meta.scope.add.duplicate_sco: &cThe region already has a scope with the same name given by command.
interaction.meta.scope.add.success: &aSuccessfully added a new scope &b{0}&a to region &b{1}&a.
interaction.meta.scope.delete.error.last: &cCannot delete the last scope of a region.
interaction.meta.scope.teleport_point.no: &cTo set a teleport point you must stay inside a region, &7or you must input name of region and scope.
interaction.meta.scope.modify.invalid_po: &cInvalid polygon parameters: &7at least three points (6 coordinates) required, must be paired.
interaction.meta.scope.modify.polygon_du: &cThe two selected points are identical, &7please select different points.
interaction.meta.scope.modify.polygon_mo: &aPolygon scope &b{0}&a successfully moved a border point in region &b{1}&a.
interaction.meta.scope.modify.polygon_no: &cNo point selected, &7please select a point first.
interaction.meta.scope.modify.polygon_in: &cInsufficient points for polygon, &7at least two points required.
interaction.meta.scope.modify.unknown_sh: &cScope &b{0}&c has unknown shape type, cannot modify.
interaction.meta.scope.modify.polygon_mi: &cA polygon scope must have at least 4 points if one point needs to be deleted.
interaction.meta.scope.modify.polygon_de: &aSuccessfully deleted a point from scope &b{0}&a of region &b{1}&a.
interaction.meta.scope.modify.polygon_po: &cOne or both of the specified points were not found in the current polygon.
&cThe two selected points are not adjacent vertices of the polygon.
interaction.meta.scope.modify.polygon_in: &aSuccessfully inserted a new point into scope &b{0}&a of region &b{1}&a.
interaction.meta.scope.modify.circle_rad: &cThe selected scope is not a valid circle. &7Please check the parameters.
&cThe new radius must be greater than 0.
&aSuccessfully modified the radius of scope &b{0}&a in region &b{1}&a from &e{2}&a to &e{3}&a.
interaction.meta.scope.modify.circle_cen: &cThe selected scope is not a valid circle. &7Please check the parameters.
&aSuccessfully moved the circle center of scope &b{0}&a in region &b{1}&a from &e({2})&a to &e({3})&a with radius &e{4}&a.
&cThe selected scope is not a valid rectangle.
&aSuccessfully updated rectangle scope &b{0}&a in region &b{1}&a. &7New coordinates: &rwest: &e{2}&r, north: &e{3}&r, east: &e{4}&r, south: &e{5}&r.
interaction.meta.scope.rename.repeated_s: &eThe new name is the same as the old name. &7Please choose a different name.
interaction.meta.scope.rename.duplicate_: &cA scope with the name &e{0}&c already exists in region &b{1}&c.
interaction.meta.scope.teleport_point.ad: &aSuccessfully added teleport point &e({0},{1},{2})&a to scope &b{3}&a in region &b{4}&a.
interaction.meta.scope.teleport_point.in: &cFailed to set teleport point at &e({0},{1},{2})&c for scope &b{3}&c in region &b{4}&c. The position does not satisfy the required conditions.
interaction.meta.scope.teleport_point.re: &aSuccessfully reset teleport point for scope &b{0}&a in region &b{1}&a.
interaction.meta.scope.teleport_point.in: &aTeleport point of region &b{4}&a scope &b{5}&a: &ex:{0} y:{1} z:{2}
&7Region &b{1}&7 scope &b{0}&7 has no teleport point set.
interaction.meta.scope.teleport_point.nu: &cTeleportation to scope &b{0}&c in region &b{1}&c was cancelled. No teleport point has been set for this scope.
interaction.meta.scope.teleport_point.un: &eWarning: &rThe teleport point (&e{2},{3},{4}&r) of scope &b{0}&r in region &b{1}&r was physically unsafe. The nearest safe location (&a{5},{6},{7}&r) was found automatically, the teleport point has been updated and you have been teleported there.

&cTeleportation to scope &b{0}&c in region &b{1}&c was cancelled. The teleport point at (&e{2},{3},{4}&c) is physically unsafe, and no safe alternative location was found within the nearby search area.
teleport_point.safety.liquid:
&7  Safety requirement: A teleport point must not be located inside water or lava. Liquid at the feet or head position would cause the player to drown or be burned immediately upon arrival.
&c  Unsafe condition at (&e{0},{1},{2}&c): A liquid block (water or lava) is present at the feet or head position.
teleport_point.safety.feet_blocked:
&7  Safety requirement: The block at the teleport point's Y level (feet position) must be fully passable with no collision. A solid block at feet level would trap or crush the player inside a block upon arrival.
&c  Unsafe condition at (&e{0},{1},{2}&c): A solid block with collision occupies the feet position.
teleport_point.safety.head_blocked:
&7  Safety requirement: The block one level above the teleport point (head position) must be fully passable with no collision. A solid block at head level would suffocate the player upon arrival.
&c  Unsafe condition at (&e{0},{1},{2}&c): A solid block with collision occupies the head position (one block above feet).
teleport_point.safety.no_ground:
&7  Safety requirement: There must be a solid, full-square block directly beneath the teleport point to support the player on arrival. Without solid ground, the player would fall into a pit or void immediately.
&c  Unsafe condition at (&e{0},{1},{2}&c): No solid ground found directly beneath the position.
teleport_point.invalid.out_of_scope:
&7  Requirement: The teleport point must lie within the geographic boundary of its scope. Placing the player outside the boundary would be inconsistent with the scope's area.
&c  Problem at (&e{0},{1},{2}&c): This position is outside the scope's geographic boundary.
teleport_point.invalid.no_shape: &cThis scope has no geographic shape defined and cannot validate a teleport point.
interaction.meta.setting.error.invalid_v: &cInvalid value for &e{0}&c. &7Expected a boolean (true/false), but got: &e{1}&c.
&cInvalid value for &e{0}&c. &7Expected an integer, but got: &e{1}&c.
interaction.meta.setting.error.region.du: &cDuplicate personal setting: &e{0}&c already exists for player &b{1}&c in this region.
&cDuplicate global setting: &e{0}&c already exists in this region.
interaction.meta.setting.error.scope.dup: &cDuplicate personal setting: &e{0}&c already exists for player &b{1}&c in scope &b{2}&c.
&cDuplicate global setting: &e{0}&c already exists in scope &b{2}&c.
interaction.meta.command.query.result:
&5&lQuery successful!&r Showing information for Region:
&e{0}&r &7(ID: &6{1}&7)&r, total area: &a{2} m²&r
§e/imyvmWorldGeo select start
  §fStart selecting positions with a command block.

§e/imyvmWorldGeo select reset
  §fClear all selected points but keep selection mode active.
interaction.meta.command.help.region.cre:
§a/imyvmWorldGeo create <§bshapeType§a> [§bname§a]
  §fCreate a region of the given shape (§brectangle§f, §bcircle§f, §bpolygon§f) from selected positions.
  §fOptionally give it a name.
interaction.meta.command.help.region.del:
§c/imyvmWorldGeo delete <§bregionIdentifier§c>
  §fDelete a region by its ID or name.
interaction.meta.command.help.scope.add:
§d/imyvmWorldGeo addScope <§bshapeType§d> <§bregionIdentifier§d> [§bscopeName§d]
  §fAdd a new scope to the region with the given shape and optional scope name.
interaction.meta.command.help.scope.modi:
§d/imyvmWorldGeo modifyScope <§bregionIdentifier§d> <§bscopeName§d> [§bnewName§d]
  §fModify a scope's properties or rename it.
interaction.meta.command.help.scope.dele:
§d/imyvmWorldGeo deleteScope <§bregionIdentifier§d> <§bscopeName§d>
  §fDelete a scope from a region.
interaction.meta.command.help.tp.set:
§b/imyvmWorldGeo teleportPoint set [§bx§b] [§by§b] [§bz§b]
  §fSet the teleport point for the current region and scope.
  §7- If coords are valid, sets to specified location.
  §7- If omitted, defaults to player's current position.
interaction.meta.command.help.tp.reset:
§b/imyvmWorldGeo teleportPoint reset <§bregionIdentifier§b> <§bscopeName§b>
  §fReset the teleport point for the specified scope.
  §7- Defaults to current scope if args are omitted.
interaction.meta.command.help.tp.inquiry:
§b/imyvmWorldGeo teleportPoint inquiry <§bregionIdentifier§b> <§bscopeName§b>
  §fInquire about the teleport point for the specified scope.
  §7- Defaults to current scope if args are omitted.
interaction.meta.command.help.tp.telepor:
§b/imyvmWorldGeo teleport <§bregionIdentifier§b> <§bscopeName§b>
  §fTeleport the player to the teleport point of the specified region and scope.
interaction.meta.command.help.tp.toggle:
§b/imyvmWorldGeo teleportPoint toggle <§bregionIdentifier§b> <§bscopeName§b>
  §fToggle the accessibility of the teleport point for the specified scope.
interaction.meta.command.help.setting.ad:
§9/imyvmWorldGeo setting add <§bregionIdentifier§9> <§bkey§9> <§bvalue§9> [§bplayerName§9]
  §fAdd a setting to a region, optionally for a specific player.
interaction.meta.command.help.setting.re:
§9/imyvmWorldGeo setting remove <§bregionIdentifier§9> <§bkey§9> [§bplayerName§9]
  §fRemove a setting from a region, optionally for a specific player.
interaction.meta.command.help.setting.qu:
§9/imyvmWorldGeo setting queryValue <§bregionIdentifier§9> <§bkey§9> [§bplayerName§9]
  §fQuery the value of a setting in a region, optionally for a specific player.
interaction.meta.command.help.setting_sc:
§5/imyvmWorldGeo settingScope add <§bregionIdentifier§5> <§bscopeName§5> <§bkey§5> <§bvalue§5> [§bplayerName§5]
  §fAdd a setting to a specific scope of a region, optionally for a specific player.

§5/imyvmWorldGeo settingScope remove <§bregionIdentifier§5> <§bscopeName§5> <§bkey§5> [§bplayerName§5]
  §fRemove a setting from a specific scope, optionally for a specific player.

§5/imyvmWorldGeo settingScope queryValue <§bregionIdentifier§5> <§bscopeName§5> <§bkey§5> [§bplayerName§5]
  §fQuery the value of a setting in a specific scope, optionally for a specific player.
interaction.meta.command.help.info.query:
§6/imyvmWorldGeo query <§bregionIdentifier§6>
  §fShow detailed information about a region.
interaction.meta.command.help.info.toggl:
§6/imyvmWorldGeo toggle
  §fToggle the action bar display for regions.
error.duplicated_points: &cCannot create a region with duplicated points.
error.insufficient_points: &cYou must select enough points for a &e{0}&c region.
error.coincident_points: &cFor a rectangle, the first two points must not share the same X or Z coordinate.
error.rectangle_too_small: &cThe rectangle is too small. &7It must meet the minimum side length and area requirements.
error.circle_too_small: &cThe circle is too small. &7The radius must be at least the minimum size.
error.polygon_too_small: &cThe polygon is too small. &7The area must be at least the minimum size.
error.under_bounding_box_limit: &cThe region is under the bounding box limit. &7Its x span or z span is too small.
error.aspect_ratio_invalid: &cThe region aspect ratio exceeds the maximum allowed limit. &7Very elongated regions are not allowed.
error.edge_too_short: &cOne or more edges of the polygon are too short. &7Each edge must be at least the minimum length.
error.intersection_between_scopes: &cThe new region intersects with an existing region scope.
scoreboard.region.none.name: -wilderness-
scoreboard.scope.none.name: -Free to use-
